title: 誰かのためのチョコレート

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Kssht! Sei here—on the lookout with Cafe. There
are two suspicious individuals in the area, I
repeat, two suspicious individuals.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What? No, I'm just here to... use the kitchen...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, humor me for a second! Aren't you
interested to see what they're making?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: (Not... really.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon, how about a black tea cake? It
shouldn't be too hard to make if it's a pound
cake.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that will do. I'll be the one to eat it, so it
doesn't need to be fancy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? It's not for Valentine's Day? I thought...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day? Ah, I suppose it is that time of
year. I don't plan on giving out anything.
Although... it would be a prime opportunity for
experimenting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I am partial to receiving something sugary, on the contrary. And I have no qualms with a black tea cake, just please make it very sweet.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... so you want me to make it, then. I'll
whip one up right now!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Shameless...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Maybe I can squeeze out a favor myself.
Uugh, I'm so hungry... I think I'll pass out if I don't
eat something sweet!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I kid, I kid.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Was that... even necessary... in the first place?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, who will be getting your chocolate come
Valentine's Day?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Well, hehe... C-could you keep this a
secret? You see...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's nice... right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What is? I couldn't hear a word. Nothing, nada.
Anywho, I'll see you around. Later!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... You're right. I think this... is what being
young is all about.
